name: Okra Salad with Oil and Vinegar Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the okra (15 oz) and chop into small pieces.
2. In a bowl, mix minced onion (1 tsp), black pepper (1/4 tsp), and minced parsley (1 tsp).
3. Add lemon juice (1 ts) to the mixture and stir well.
4. Cut tomatoes into eighths and add them to the bowl with the okra mixture.
5. Season with salt to taste.
6. Toss in salad greens and serve.
